title: scutellaria atrocyanea
intro: Scutellaria atrocyanea, also known as the dark blue skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria atrocyanea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria atrocyanea include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
